title: The Fall of Nouraajd
description: From the ruined town to the siege beyond the marsh: recover what the dead left behind, break the soul-binding ritual, and hold the last gatehouse.
completionText: The last breach is sealed and the marsh falls quiet. What began with a dead sergeant's letter ends on a held wall: Nouraajd survives the night, and so do you.

recovery.title: Chapter I - The Ruined Town
recovery.briefing: The town of Nouraajd lies in ruin and its dead do not rest. A letter from the late Sergeant Rolf points into the caves beneath the town; follow his trail, put down what killed him, and cleanse the corruption before it spreads.
recovery.epilogue: The cave is purged and the town breathes again, but Beren's eyes stay fixed on the marsh road. Whatever fed the corruption is still out there, chanting.

cleansing.title: Chapter II - The Ritual
cleansing.briefing: An abandoned chapel pulses with a soul-binding rite. Break the three anchors before the final verse completes, defeat the ritual leader, and decide the fate of the captive soul held in the stained glass.
cleansing.epilogue: The rescued captive walks beside you out of the chapel, pointing past the marsh to a gatehouse under siege. The cult's remnants have somewhere left to run - and something left to burn.

siege.title: Chapter III - The Siege
siege.briefing: The road ends at a besieged gatehouse. Seal every breach with charged mage-wands before the attackers overrun the wall; the Pritz mages among them carry spares, if you can take them.
